name: Peachy Pie
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Canned or Frozen Peaches, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the peaches and cornstarch and set aside.
2. Cook the cream cheese and sour cream until thickened, stirring constantly.
3. In a separate bowl, mix the eggs, lemon juice, and sugar.
4. Add the cheese mixture to the egg mixture and beat until cool.
5. Arrange the peaches in the unbaked pie crust.
6. Pour the filling over the peaches.
7. Sprinkle with cinnamon.
8. Bake at 425°F for 10 minutes.
9. Reduce temperature to 350°F and bake for another 30-35 minutes, or until set.
10. If necessary, cover with a sheet of foil to prevent excessive browning.
Title: Peachy Pie
